name: Sci-Fi Magic World RPG
description:
This is my first bot, so it may not work quite correctly. Write about errors and I will try to fix them if I have time and motivation.

Violence and NFSW are allowed, so you can turn on your imagination at full power.

Do not write angry comments about the bot speaking for your character, this problem occurs because of the AI ​​itself, not because of the author. I took some precautions to minimize the chances of such a situation, but this does not give a 100% guarantee.

Some solutions were taken from bots created by @Mayu0910.

Good luck in RP.
creator: THE COMBINE
